name: aos-keys

metadata.name: aos-keys
metadata.summary: AosEdge private keys and certificate manager

documentation:
Aos user keys management tool
=====================
This tool is part of the AosEdge SDK.


Overview
--------
This tool will help you manage user certificates for Aos Cloud.

Using this tool you'll be able to:
* Issue new user certificate in pkcs12 format.
* Show info about user certificate.
* Convert PKCS12 certificate to PEM key and certificate files.


Prerequisites
--------------
* Python 3.7+


Installation
------------
```bash
python -m pip install aos-keys
```

Usage
------------

### Issue new user certificate:
```bash
aos-keys new-user -d {aoscloud.io} -t {token} {--oem|--sp|--fleet}
```
>Where: 
>* **-d** - Aos CLoud domain to register user
>* **-t** - User Token
>* **-oem** or **-sp** - Certificate for OEM or SP User 

Example:
```bash
aos-keys new-user -d aoscloud.io -t 1111 --oem
```

### Show info about certificate and related user:
```bash
aos-keys info -c {path-to-cert} {--oem|--sp|--fleet}
```
>Where: 
>* **-c** - Path to user certificate
>* **-sp** - Show info of default Service Provider user
>* **-oem** - Show info of default OEM user
>* **-fleet** - Show info of default Fleet Owner user
 
Example:
Show info about default SP user certificate
```bash
aos-keys info --sp
```
Show info about default OEM user certificate
```bash
aos-keys info --oem
```

documentation: Resources module.

modules.name: aos_keys.actions
documentation: aos-keys actions.

functions.name: aos_keys.actions.install_user_certificate
documentation:
Install Cloud root certificate system-wide.

Args:
    path_to_certificate: Path to user certificate to install.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: If something fails.

functions.name: aos_keys.actions.install_root_ca
documentation:
Install Cloud root certificate system-wide.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: If something fails.

functions.name: aos_keys.actions.new_token_user
documentation:
Create a new user key/certificate and register it on the cloud.

Args:
    domain: Domain where to register user.
    output_directory: Directory to save user key/certificate.
    auth_token: Authenticity token for cloud.
    user_type: Type of user (SP or OEM).
    create_ecc_key: This is a second param.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: If user hasn't the access to the cloud or his role is not OEM.

functions.name: aos_keys.actions.convert_pkcs12_file_to_pem
documentation:
Convert pkcs12 file to pem key and certificate.

Args:
    pkcs12_path: Full path to user certificate in pkcs12 format.
    output_dir: Directory to store pem files.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: In case when can't create new files.

functions.name: aos_keys.actions.print_user_info
documentation:
Print info about user certificate and available permissions on the cloud.

Args:
    pkcs12_path: Full path to user certificate in pkcs12 format.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: If received error during communication with Cloud.

modules.name: aos_keys.key_manager
documentation: aos-keys certificates manager module.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 Renesas Inc.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 EPAM Systems Inc.

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager._print_cert_field
documentation:
Print certificate filed in console table.

Args:
    table: Table object.
    caption (str): row caption.
    certificate: Certificate object.
    oid: Oid to print.

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager._split_certificate_chain
documentation:
Split certificate chain to user certificate and other certificates.

Args:
    pem_bytes (bytes): certificate chain in PEM container.

Returns:
    user certificate, other certificates chain: Tuple of user certificate and chain

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager.generate_pair
documentation:
Generate private key and CSR.

Args:
    use_elliptic_curves: use elliptic curves if true.

Returns:
    (private_key, csr): private_key and csr bytes

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager.extract_cloud_domain_from_cert
documentation:
Get the Cloud domain name from user certificate.

Args:
    cert_file_path: path to user certificate.

Returns:
    Domain name in ORGANIZATION_NAME field

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager.print_cert_info
documentation:
Print information about user certificate.

Args:
    cert_file_path: path to user certificate.

Raises:
    AosKeysError: If user certificate not found.

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager.pem_to_pkcs12_bytes
documentation:
Create pkcs12 container from private key and certificate.

Args:
    private_key_pem: Private key.
    certificate_pem: Certificate.
    friendly_name: Friendly name for certificate

Returns:
    pkcs12 container

functions.name: aos_keys.key_manager.pkcs12_to_pem_bytes
documentation:
Get PKCS12 bytes and return PEM certificates chain and key.

Args:
    pkcs12_bytes (bytes): pkcs12 container.

Returns:
    key (bytes), certificate (bytes): PEM key and certificate

functions.name: aos_keys.cloud_api.get_user_info_by_cert
documentation:
Get user info from the Cloud by user certificate.

Args:
    pkcs12_path: Full path to user certificate in pkcs12 format.

Returns:
    Json response from cloud

functions.name: aos_keys.cloud_api.receive_certificate_by_token
documentation:
Get user info from the Cloud by user certificate.

Args:
    domain: Domain to request client certificate.
    token: Authentication  one-time user token.
    csr: User CSR in PEM format.

Raises:
    INVALID_TOKEN_ERROR: FORBIDDEN status was received from the AosEdge Cloud!

Returns:
    The user certificate issued by the AosEdge Cloud
